name: gcd
cpp_unit: long gcd(long a, long b){ while(b!=0){ long t=b; b=a%b; a=t; } return a; }
mojo_unit:
def gcd(a: Int, b: Int) -> Int:
    var x = a
    var y = b
    while y != 0:
        var t = y
        y = x % y
        x = t
    return x
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%ld
", gcd(48,18)); printf("%ld
", gcd(17,5)); printf("%ld
", gcd(100,10)); printf("%ld
", gcd(0,9)); return 0; }
mojo_driver:
def main():
    print(gcd(48, 18))
    print(gcd(17, 5))
    print(gcd(100, 10))
    print(gcd(0, 9))

name: lcm
cpp_unit:
long gcd2(long a, long b){ while(b!=0){ long t=b; b=a%b; a=t; } return a; }
long lcm(long a, long b){ if(a==0||b==0) return 0; return a/gcd2(a,b)*b; }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%ld
", lcm(4,6)); printf("%ld
", lcm(21,6)); printf("%ld
", lcm(5,7)); printf("%ld
", lcm(0,5)); return 0; }
mojo_driver:
def main():
    print(lcm(4, 6))
    print(lcm(21, 6))
    print(lcm(5, 7))
    print(lcm(0, 5))

name: fib_iter
cpp_unit: long fib_iter(long n){ long a=0,b=1; for(long i=0;i<n;i++){ long t=a+b; a=b; b=t; } return a; }
mojo_unit:
def fib_iter(n: Int) -> Int:
    var a = 0
    var b = 1
    for _i in range(n):
        var t = a + b
        a = b
        b = t
    return a
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%ld
", fib_iter(0)); printf("%ld
", fib_iter(1)); printf("%ld
", fib_iter(10)); printf("%ld
", fib_iter(20)); return 0; }
mojo_driver:
def main():
    print(fib_iter(0))
    print(fib_iter(1))
    print(fib_iter(10))
    print(fib_iter(20))

name: is_prime
cpp_unit: bool is_prime(long n){ if(n<2) return false; for(long i=2;i*i<=n;i++){ if(n%i==0) return false; } return true; }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%d
", is_prime(1)?1:0); printf("%d
", is_prime(2)?1:0); printf("%d
", is_prime(17)?1:0); printf("%d
", is_prime(100)?1:0); printf("%d
", is_prime(97)?1:0); return 0; }
mojo_driver:
def main():
    print(1 if is_prime(1) else 0)
    print(1 if is_prime(2) else 0)
    print(1 if is_prime(17) else 0)
    print(1 if is_prime(100) else 0)
    print(1 if is_prime(97) else 0)

name: sieve_count
cpp_unit: long sieve_count(long n){ if(n<2) return 0; std::vector<bool> sieve(n+1,true); sieve[0]=false; sieve[1]=false; for(long i=2;i*i<=n;i++){ if(sieve[i]){ for(long j=i*i;j<=n;j+=i) sieve[j]=false; } } long c=0; for(long i=2;i<=n;i++) if(sieve[i]) c++; return c; }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%ld
", sieve_count(10)); printf("%ld
", sieve_count(30)); printf("%ld
", sieve_count(100)); printf("%ld
", sieve_count(1)); return 0; }
mojo_driver:
def main():
    print(sieve_count(10))
    print(sieve_count(30))
    print(sieve_count(100))
    print(sieve_count(1))

name: collatz_len
cpp_unit: long collatz_len(long n){ long c=0; while(n!=1){ if(n%2==0) n/=2; else n=3*n+1; c++; } return c; }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%ld
", collatz_len(1)); printf("%ld
", collatz_len(6)); printf("%ld
", collatz_len(27)); printf("%ld
", collatz_len(7)); return 0; }
mojo_driver:
def main():
    print(collatz_len(1))
    print(collatz_len(6))
    print(collatz_len(27))
    print(collatz_len(7))

name: sum_digits
cpp_unit: long sum_digits(long n){ if(n<0) n=-n; long s=0; while(n>0){ s+=n%10; n/=10; } return s; }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%ld
", sum_digits(0)); printf("%ld
", sum_digits(12345)); printf("%ld
", sum_digits(-987)); printf("%ld
", sum_digits(1000000)); return 0; }
mojo_driver:
def main():
    print(sum_digits(0))
    print(sum_digits(12345))
    print(sum_digits(-987))
    print(sum_digits(1000000))

name: reverse_int
cpp_unit: long reverse_int(long n){ long sign = n<0 ? -1 : 1; if(n<0) n=-n; long r=0; while(n>0){ r=r*10+n%10; n/=10; } return sign*r; }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%ld
", reverse_int(123)); printf("%ld
", reverse_int(-456)); printf("%ld
", reverse_int(1200)); printf("%ld
", reverse_int(0)); return 0; }
mojo_driver:
def main():
    print(reverse_int(123))
    print(reverse_int(-456))
    print(reverse_int(1200))
    print(reverse_int(0))

name: climb_stairs
cpp_unit: long climb_stairs(long n){ if(n<=2) return n; long a=1,b=2; for(long i=3;i<=n;i++){ long t=a+b; a=b; b=t; } return b; }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%ld
", climb_stairs(1)); printf("%ld
", climb_stairs(2)); printf("%ld
", climb_stairs(5)); printf("%ld
", climb_stairs(10)); return 0; }
mojo_driver:
def main():
    print(climb_stairs(1))
    print(climb_stairs(2))
    print(climb_stairs(5))
    print(climb_stairs(10))

name: coin_count
cpp_unit: long coin_count(long amount){ std::vector<long> coins={1,5,10,25}; std::vector<long> dp(amount+1, 1000000); dp[0]=0; for(long c=0;c<(long)coins.size();c++){ for(long a=coins[c];a<=amount;a++){ if(dp[a-coins[c]]+1<dp[a]) dp[a]=dp[a-coins[c]]+1; } } return dp[amount]; }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%ld
", coin_count(11)); printf("%ld
", coin_count(25)); printf("%ld
", coin_count(63)); printf("%ld
", coin_count(0)); return 0; }
mojo_driver:
def main():
    print(coin_count(11))
    print(coin_count(25))
    print(coin_count(63))
    print(coin_count(0))

name: ackermann
cpp_unit: long ackermann(long m, long n){ if(m==0) return n+1; if(n==0) return ackermann(m-1,1); return ackermann(m-1, ackermann(m,n-1)); }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%ld
", ackermann(0,0)); printf("%ld
", ackermann(1,1)); printf("%ld
", ackermann(2,3)); printf("%ld
", ackermann(3,3)); return 0; }
mojo_driver:
def main():
    print(ackermann(0, 0))
    print(ackermann(1, 1))
    print(ackermann(2, 3))
    print(ackermann(3, 3))

name: fib_rec
cpp_unit: long fib_rec(long n){ if(n<2) return n; return fib_rec(n-1)+fib_rec(n-2); }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%ld
", fib_rec(0)); printf("%ld
", fib_rec(1)); printf("%ld
", fib_rec(10)); printf("%ld
", fib_rec(15)); return 0; }
mojo_driver:
def main():
    print(fib_rec(0))
    print(fib_rec(1))
    print(fib_rec(10))
    print(fib_rec(15))

name: sum_to_n_rec
cpp_unit: long sum_to_n(long n){ if(n<=0) return 0; return n + sum_to_n(n-1); }

name: popcount
cpp_unit: long popcount(long n){ long c=0; while(n!=0){ c+=n&1; n>>=1; } return c; }
mojo_unit:
def popcount(n: Int) -> Int:
    var x = n
    var c = 0
    while x != 0:
        c += x & 1
        x >>= 1
    return c
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%ld
", popcount(0)); printf("%ld
", popcount(7)); printf("%ld
", popcount(255)); printf("%ld
", popcount(1024)); return 0; }
mojo_driver:
def main():
    print(popcount(0))
    print(popcount(7))
    print(popcount(255))
    print(popcount(1024))

name: is_power_of_two
cpp_unit: bool is_pow2(long n){ return n>0 && (n&(n-1))==0; }
mojo_unit:
def is_pow2(n: Int) -> Bool:
    return n > 0 and (n & (n - 1)) == 0
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%d
", is_pow2(1)?1:0); printf("%d
", is_pow2(16)?1:0); printf("%d
", is_pow2(18)?1:0); printf("%d
", is_pow2(0)?1:0); return 0; }
mojo_driver:
def main():
    print(1 if is_pow2(1) else 0)
    print(1 if is_pow2(16) else 0)
    print(1 if is_pow2(18) else 0)
    print(1 if is_pow2(0) else 0)

name: hamming_distance
cpp_unit: long hamming(long a, long b){ long x=a^b; long c=0; while(x!=0){ c+=x&1; x>>=1; } return c; }
mojo_unit:
def hamming(a: Int, b: Int) -> Int:
    var x = a ^ b
    var c = 0
    while x != 0:
        c += x & 1
        x >>= 1
    return c
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%ld
", hamming(0,0)); printf("%ld
", hamming(1,4)); printf("%ld
", hamming(255,0)); printf("%ld
", hamming(13,7)); return 0; }
mojo_driver:
def main():
    print(hamming(0, 0))
    print(hamming(1, 4))
    print(hamming(255, 0))
    print(hamming(13, 7))

name: int_log2
cpp_unit: long int_log2(long n){ long r=0; while(n>1){ n>>=1; r++; } return r; }
mojo_unit:
def int_log2(n: Int) -> Int:
    var x = n
    var r = 0
    while x > 1:
        x >>= 1
        r += 1
    return r
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%ld
", int_log2(1)); printf("%ld
", int_log2(8)); printf("%ld
", int_log2(255)); printf("%ld
", int_log2(1024)); return 0; }
mojo_driver:
def main():
    print(int_log2(1))
    print(int_log2(8))
    print(int_log2(255))
    print(int_log2(1024))

name: newton_sqrt
cpp_unit: double newton_sqrt(double x){ if(x<=0) return 0.0; double g=x; for(int i=0;i<50;i++){ g=0.5*(g + x/g); } return g; }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%.10f
", newton_sqrt(2.0)); printf("%.10f
", newton_sqrt(9.0)); printf("%.10f
", newton_sqrt(0.25)); printf("%.10f
", newton_sqrt(1000.0)); return 0; }
mojo_driver:
def main():
    print(newton_sqrt(2.0))
    print(newton_sqrt(9.0))
    print(newton_sqrt(0.25))
    print(newton_sqrt(1000.0))

name: fraction_reduce_num
cpp_unit:
long gcd3(long a, long b){ while(b!=0){ long t=b; b=a%b; a=t; } return a; }
long reduce_num(long num, long den){ long g=gcd3(num<0?-num:num, den<0?-den:den); if(g==0) return num; return num/g; }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%ld
", reduce_num(6,8)); printf("%ld
", reduce_num(15,25)); printf("%ld
", reduce_num(7,3)); printf("%ld
", reduce_num(100,40)); return 0; }
mojo_driver:
def main():
    print(reduce_num(6, 8))
    print(reduce_num(15, 25))
    print(reduce_num(7, 3))
    print(reduce_num(100, 40))

cpp_unit: long factorial_iter(long n){ long r=1; for(long i=2;i<=n;i++) r*=i; return r; }
